description: Install dependencies and verify baseline build passes (lint + typecheck)
steps: Run `npm run lint` and confirm it passes
Run `npm run typecheck` and confirm it passes
acceptance_criteria: npm run lint passes with exit code 0
npm run typecheck passes with exit code 0
findings: npm install added 1022 packages successfully. Both `npm run lint` (expo lint) and `npm run typecheck` (tsc --noEmit) pass with exit code 0. The project name in package.json is still 'opencode-mobile@1.0.2'. 32 audit vulnerabilities reported (non-blocking).
